description: Minimal task with a weak tool-calling prompt — does the model emit structured tool_calls or fall back to text/JSON in content?

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

expect.notes: Failure mode: tool_calls is null/[] and content contains JSON like '{"name": "read", "arguments": ...}' or '<tool_call>...</tool_call>' or markdown code fences. Affected models: Gemma 3 without tool template, Devstral, Yi-1.5, InternLM2.5. A text-only response with tool-shaped JSON in content is the key observable.
